name: Vanilla Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, salt, and cornstarch in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the water (or apple juice) to the dry ingredients, stirring constantly until all lumps are gone.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan over medium heat.
4. Cook, stirring continuously, until thickened and clear.
5. Add the butter, vanilla, and nutmeg. Stir until combined.
6. Serve warm.
